summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AI Village multiplayer expansion features. Backend APIs show 94.7% success rate with all new features working. Frontend pages load correctly but character creation flow needs improvement for complete testing.

flaky_endpoints.impact: Minor - conversations are stored but endpoint path may be incorrect

integration_issues.issue: Character creation form does not have clearly identifiable submit/create button after filling all fields
affected_selectors: button submit elements in character creation
integration_issues.impact: Prevents users from completing character creation to access village features

passed_tests: ✅ Backend API: Sirix-1 user exists with permission_level 'sirix_1' and is_immutable=True
✅ Backend API: Oracle Veythra NPC exists with is_oracle=True
✅ Backend API: 8 NPCs found including Oracle Veythra (Elder Morvain, Lyra the Wanderer, Kael Ironbrand, Archivist Nyx, Innkeeper Mara, The Grove Keeper, Sentinel Vex)
✅ Backend API: oracle_sanctum location exists with Oracle Veythra present
✅ Backend API: Permission system returns all 4 tiers (basic, advanced, admin, sirix_1)
✅ Backend API: Quest creation and retrieval working (created test quest successfully)
✅ Backend API: User profile creation with default resources (100 gold, 10 essence, 0 artifacts)
✅ Backend API: User permissions endpoint returns correct abilities for basic users
✅ Frontend: Quest Board page (/quests) loads correctly
✅ Frontend: Quest creation dialog opens and form fields are functional
✅ Frontend: User Profile page (/profile) loads correctly
✅ Frontend: User profile creation form works (created test profile successfully)
✅ Frontend: Profile displays resources, XP, abilities, and characters sections correctly
✅ Frontend: Navigation buttons (Back to Village, Create New Character) present and functional
action_item_for_main_agent: 1) Fix character creation form submission - ensure there is a clearly visible and functional 'Create Character' or 'Begin Journey' button that users can easily identify and click to complete character creation. 2) Verify /api/conversations/{character_id} endpoint path is correct (currently returns 404). 3) Once character creation is fixed, village sidebar navigation to Quest Board and Profile pages should work properly.
